message:
✨ Show mission version, maturity, and quality on browse cards (#1706)

- Add projectVersion, maturity, qualityScore to IndexEntry type
  (matching new fields from console-kb index)
- Wire index metadata through indexEntryToMission() so version info
  is available without fetching full mission JSON
- Display version badge (e.g., v1.4.1) and maturity badge
  (graduated/incubating/sandbox) on RecommendationCard browse cards

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
